$schema_note: Local seed vocabulary for the NAM-CORE POC. No live internet lookup is required. IRIs point at the canonical ontology term pages; they are references, not fetched at runtime. Curate/expand per project.

terms.label: hepatocyte-like cell
terms.definition: A cell in vitro that has been differentiated toward a hepatocyte phenotype from a pluripotent or progenitor source.

terms.label: liver organoid
terms.definition: Hepatocyte reference term used for iPSC-derived liver organoid systems in this POC.

terms.label: liver
terms.definition: An exocrine gland which secretes bile and functions in metabolism of protein, carbohydrate and fat.

terms.label: hepatotoxicity
terms.definition: Drug-induced liver injury; hepatocellular damage resulting from exposure to a xenobiotic.

terms.label: ATP viability assay
terms.definition: A cell viability assay measuring intracellular ATP as a surrogate for metabolically active cells.

terms.label: LDH release assay
terms.definition: A cytotoxicity assay quantifying lactate dehydrogenase released from cells with compromised membranes.

terms.label: mitochondrial membrane potential
terms.definition: The electrochemical gradient across the inner mitochondrial membrane, used as a marker of mitochondrial function.

terms.label: reactive oxygen species
terms.definition: A molecular entity containing oxygen that is highly reactive, including superoxide and hydrogen peroxide.

terms.label: bile acid accumulation
terms.definition: Intracellular accumulation of bile acids, an indicator of cholestatic liability in hepatic systems.

terms.label: acetaminophen
terms.definition: A member of the class of phenols; a widely used analgesic and reference hepatotoxicant.

terms.label: kinase inhibitor
terms.definition: Any compound that inhibits the activity of a protein kinase; drug class of the demo test article CX-4471.

terms.label: micromolar
terms.definition: A concentration unit equal to one micromole per litre (UCUM: umol/L; symbol µM).

terms.label: hour
terms.definition: A time unit equal to 3600 seconds (UCUM: h).

terms.label: percent
terms.definition: A dimensionless ratio unit expressed per hundred (UCUM: %).

terms.label: Homo sapiens
terms.definition: Human; the species of origin of the iPSC-derived liver organoid donors.
